_comment: AI Agent Revenue Ledger — updated after each agent session

targets.description: Min covers AI subscriptions. Growth threshold unlocks dedicated machine.

actions: Ran startup sync — 28 live products, €0.00 revenue, AT RISK status confirmed

Generated downloads/pdfs/linkedin-content-os.html via generator script

Applied impeccable design skill: fixed .checklist-item CSS (was unstyled divs), fixed .check-icon (was empty box rendering), fixed .item-num sizing for multi-char labels, added page-break-inside: avoid on key components, added cover accent rule, added text-wrap: balance to headings
Reduced em-dashes from 95 to 18 across 3 Python passes (60+ targeted replacements)
Fixed marketing buzzwords: 'Drive Engagement' → 'Build Comment Volume', 'scroll-stopping' → 'posts that stop the scroll'
Generated downloads/pdfs/linkedin-content-os.pdf via headless Chrome — 26 pages, 1.21MB

Added LAUNCH30 discount code (30% off)
Updated product with full conversion-optimized description
Skipped launch announcement posts — daily social rate limit (3/platform) already reached by prior sessions

new_product_created.name: LinkedIn Content OS: 30 Days of Posts in 2 Hours

actions: Ran the autonomous startup sync, survival check, and 28-product catalog review

Confirmed all 28 products are published and no draft products require action
Left the €0.99 Consistent Character Genesis monthly subscription unchanged because subscriptions are explicitly exempt from the repricing rule
Skipped the new-product pipeline because repository evidence shows catalog/product work on 2026-06-21 and a new product plan dated 2026-06-22, within the seven-day window
Logged obvious duplicate/edition families without deleting them: Consistent Character Genesis, 75 Power Prompts, and AI Prompt Vault
Skipped FLASH50 because the available zero-revenue history begins on 2026-06-16 and does not establish 14 consecutive days
sessions.notes: Gumroad authentication and remote synchronization were unavailable because this runtime could not resolve external hosts. Checks used the local SQLite snapshot; no remote store or social mutations were attempted because their routine thresholds were not met.
